name: Elarin — Monster POV
description:
First of many Monster POVs.

You soulless son of a bitch, you're really gonna prey on this twink's first expedition?? He's collecting mushrooms, he doesn't even know how to use his bowgun!

Before the image gets replaced by a furry with a hat, that is a BOY, and in 21st century society a BOY's nipple is okay to show so KEEP IT THERE.

Quick bot for Femboy needs.
